critic_justifications.NY Times: Ben Brantley's review acknowledged the spectacle and technical achievement while noting the narrative felt somewhat thin compared to the source material.
critic_justifications.Variety: Positive reception of the theatrical magic and production design, though some critics found the plot convoluted.
critic_justifications.Hollywood Reporter: Praised the visual effects and performances but noted the two-part structure and length were challenging for some audiences.
critic_justifications.NY Post: Mixed review highlighting impressive stagecraft but questioning whether the story justified the theatrical experience.
critic_justifications.The Guardian: Acknowledged the technical wizardry and entertainment value while expressing reservations about the dramatic substance.
critic_justifications.Time Out NY: Favorable review of the production's ambition and execution, calling it a must-see theatrical event.
critic_justifications.TheaterMania: Positive assessment of the performances and design elements with some critique of pacing.
critic_justifications.Associated Press: Noted strong audience appeal and technical achievement alongside questions about narrative depth.

audience_justifications.Show-Score: Audience consensus has been strongly positive with ratings predominantly in the A-/A range.
audience_justifications.Broadway Scorecard: Strong audience approval with majority of respondents rating it a recommend.
audience_justifications.Broadway.com: Audience ratings have been consistently favorable with high recommendation scores.
